channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Stop guessing with your money. While the world panics, the top 1% are positioning themselves for the biggest wealth transfer in history.
channel.description: Stop guessing with your money. The global economy is changing faster than ever.

item.title: What’s the most attractive genre of entertainment?
item.description: "Discover the allure of different entertainment genres and find out what makes them so captivating. From movies to music, and theater to TV shows, which genre reigns supreme? Dive into the world of entertainment and explore the answer in our latest video. Read more about the most attractive genre of entertainment here: https://www.economist.com/culture/2026/04/05/whats-the-most-attractive-genre-of-entertainment"
